description: A company that represents a customer or a potential customer.
A person record is one associated with a patron of the bank.
A prospect represents a potential customer or sale happening in the system. A prospect can be represented by either prospects or referrals.
Process entity for Lead to Opportunity  Sales Process.
The physical bank location which contains information such as the name and location of the bank.
A branch is used to represent the location of a bank branch.
Process entity for a Business Checking Account.
Process entity for a Certificate of Deposit.
Collateral entity represents the collateral information related to a commercial loan product that the customer holds with the bank.
Process entity for a Commercial Deposit.
Process entity for a Commercial Loan.
Process entity for Company 360.
Process entity for Company Onboarding.
Process entity for Contact Onboarding from Prospect.
Process entity for Customer 360 Person.
Process entity for a Customer Journey.
The record of the different products that the customer holds with the bank.

A KYC or Know Your Customer is used to gather information on the customer in a regular interval. The KYCs collect information such as where they live, collecting their updated or different ID information, and their risk level at that point in time.
Limit entity represents corporate client's limits set up in the limit management system or the bank's backend systems such as core banking, treasury, or trade finance systems.
A requested facility represents a facility that is requested by a corporate customer applying for line of credit.

A syndicate represents the information related to a commercial loan product that the customer holds with the bank. The syndicate will reference a specific loan, the contribution percentage, the amount and the specific bank that holds the syndicate.
Process entity for a Mortgage.
An opportunity represents a qualified prospect or an existing customer's interest in a product of the bank.
The products of the bank that the prospect or referral is interested in.
